name: Nicole Lockett
title: Paralegal
bio:
Nicole received her Associate of Applied Sciences in Paralegal Studies from Highline Community College in 2010. She holds an Associate of Arts degree with an emphasis on Performance Arts, English, and Anthropology from Green River Community College, where she graduated with honors and as a member of Phi Theta Kappa. In addition to these degrees, she is pursuing her Bachelor of Arts at The Evergreen State College.

Nicole has extensive experience in customer service and administration having worked at a number of corporations before pursuing her interest in the legal field.

Nicole is a passionate animal lover having volunteered for Action For Animals in Seattle, Washington and Cats Protection in London, England. She has also volunteered at animal shelters in Nepal and India during her travels.

In her spare time, Nicole likes to travel. She recently traveled extensively throughout South Asia and Europe. She is an enthusiastic and avid actor who performs regularly at local community theatres. Multi-talented Nicole is additionally a semi-professional choreographer in the Puget Sound Area.
